name: Randy Farkas Jerked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the seasonings and soy sauce.
2. Rub the mixture over the chicken pieces.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight to marinate.
4. The next day, bake the marinated chicken in a 350°F oven for 1-1/2 hours.
5. Meanwhile, blend all sauce ingredients until smooth.
6. When the chicken has cooked for 1-1/2 hours, remove from the oven and dip each piece in the blended sauce mixture.
7. Return the chicken to the oven and bake an additional 15 minutes.
8. Boil the remaining sauce for 15 to 20 minutes, or until thickened.
9. Serve hot sauce with the chicken.
